name: modern_line
description: Line 風格主題，採用品牌綠色和白色配色，圓角友善設計。適合亞洲市場通訊軟體整合。

styles.body: margin: 0; padding: 16px; background-color: #e5e5e5; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'Hiragino Sans', 'Noto Sans CJK JP', sans-serif;
styles..container: max-width: 100%; margin: 0 auto; background-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 18px; box-shadow: 0 3px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); overflow: hidden;
styles..title: background-color: #06c755; color: #ffffff; padding: 20px 24px; font-size: 19px; font-weight: 700; text-align: center; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
styles.th: padding: 14px 16px; text-align: center; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #495057; border-bottom: 2px solid #dee2e6;
styles.td: padding: 14px 16px; font-size: 15px; color: #212529; border-bottom: 1px solid #e9ecef; text-align: center; line-height: 1.5;
styles..footer: background-color: #f8f9fa; color: #6c757d; padding: 12px 20px; font-size: 12px; text-align: center; border-top: 1px solid #e9ecef;

warning.description: 需注意、接近閾值、待觀察
